reasoning_content: When assigning the method to an instance, it's not bound properly. I need to assign the function to the class, not the instance. Let me fix the test.

function.name: run_custom_test
function.arguments:
{"code": "from Bio.Graphics import BasicChromosome as BC
from Bio.Graphics.BasicChromosome import Chromosome
from reportlab.graphics.shapes import Drawing
from reportlab.lib.units import inch

def bc_chromosome_draw_label(self, cur_drawing, label_name):
    from reportlab.graphics.shapes import String
    from reportlab.pdfbase.pdfmetrics import stringWidth
    import os
    
    # Read label text from file if label_name is an existing file
    if os.path.exists(label_name):
        with open(label_name, 'r') as f:
            label_name = f.read().strip()
    
    # Get coordinates
    start_x = self.start_x_position
    end_x = self.end_x_position
    start_y = self.start_y_position
    
    # Center x coordinate (works correctly regardless of order)
    center_x = 0.5 * (start_x + end_x)
    
    # Y position: above the chromosome, offset by 0.1 inch
    y_pos = start_y + 0.1 * inch
    
    # Get title size (default to 10 if missing)
    title_size = getattr(self, 'title_size', 10)
    
    # Chromosome width (absolute value handles swapped coordinates)
    chrom_width = abs(end_x - start_x)
    
    # Measure label width
    font_name = 'Helvetica'
    label_width = stringWidth(label_name, font_name, title_size)
    
    # If label width exceeds chromosome width, reduce font size proportionally
    if label_width > chrom_width and chrom_width > 0:
        title_size = title_size * (chrom_width / label_width)
    
    # Create the string centered at the computed position
    label = String(center_x, y_pos, label_name, 
                   textAnchor='middle',
                   fontName=font_name, 
                   fontSize=title_size)
    
    # Add to drawing
    cur_drawing.add(label)

# Monkey-patch the class
Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label

# Test 1: Basic centering and offset
dwg1 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom1 = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom1.start_x_position = 50
chrom1.end_x_position = 350
chrom1.start_y_position = 30
chrom1.title_size = 14
chrom1._draw_label(dwg1, 'TestLabel')

# Check that we have one string added
strings = [el for el in dwg1.contents if hasattr(el, 'text')]
assert len(strings) == 1, f"Expected 1 string, got {len(strings)}"
s = strings[0]
expected_x = 0.5 * (50 + 350)
expected_y = 30 + 0.1 * inch
print(f"Test 1 - Center x: {s.x} vs expected: {expected_x}")
print(f"Test 1 - Y pos: {s.y} vs expected: {expected_y}")
assert abs(s.x - expected_x) < 0.001, f"X position mismatch: {s.x} vs {expected_x}"
assert abs(s.y - expected_y) < 0.001, f"Y position mismatch: {s.y} vs {expected_y}"
assert s.textAnchor == 'middle'
print("Test 1 PASSED: Centering and offset correct")

# Test 2: Swapped coordinates
dwg2 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom2 = Chromosome('Chr2')
chrom2.start_x_position = 350
chrom2.end_x_position = 50
chrom2.start_y_position = 30
chrom2.title_size = 14
chrom2._draw_label(dwg2, 'Swapped')

strings2 = [el for el in dwg2.contents if hasattr(el, 'text')]
s2 = strings2[0]
expected_x2 = 0.5 * (350 + 50)  # Same as 0.5*(50+350)
print(f"Test 2 - Center x: {s2.x} vs expected: {expected_x2}")
assert abs(s2.x - expected_x2) < 0.001, f"X position mismatch for swapped coords"
print("Test 2 PASSED: Swapped coordinates handled")

# Test 3: Missing title_size
dwg3 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom3 = Chromosome('Chr3')
chrom3.start_x_position = 50
chrom3.end_x_position = 350
chrom3.start_y_position = 30
# No title_size set
chrom3._draw_label(dwg3, 'NoTitleSize')

strings3 = [el for el in dwg3.contents if hasattr(el, 'text')]
s3 = strings3[0]
print(f"Test 3 - Font size: {s3.fontSize} (default should be 10)")
assert abs(s3.fontSize - 10.0) < 0.001, f"Default font size should be 10, got {s3.fontSize}"
print("Test 3 PASSED: Missing title_size uses default")

# Test 4: Font scaling for long label
dwg4 = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom4 = Chromosome('Chr4')
chrom4.start_x_position = 100
chrom4.end_x_position = 300  # width = 200
chrom4.start_y_position = 30
chrom4.title_size = 14
# A very long label that should exceed chromosome width
chrom4._draw_label(dwg4, 'ThisIsAVeryLongChromosomeLabelThatShouldBeScaled')

strings4 = [el for el in dwg4.contents if hasattr(el, 'text')]
s4 = strings4[0]
print(f"Test 4 - Font size after scaling: {s4.fontSize}")
assert s4.fontSize < 14, f"Font size should be reduced, got {s4.fontSize}"
print("Test 4 PASSED: Font scaling applied for long label")

print("\nAll tests passed!")", "timeout_seconds": 10}
